sys_script_include.description:
2.8 | 2022-02-13 - raj - STRY0117523 - Org Hierarchy- Office Schedule Override- Add System Settings to turn on/off feature 2.7 -STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates 2.7 - STRY0106444 - DIA - Draft Scheduled Tasks - Email Notification
This script include contains all of the functions used to run the recurring Taskers.
These Methods are used in the Scheduled Script Exection script - "DiscoverTasker - Start Recurring Processes"
sys_script_include.name: Tasker_RecurringTask_Functions
